yaml:
workflow:
  id: ticket-triage
  name: Support Ticket Triage
  description: |
    Classifies inbound support tickets, fans out enrichment in parallel,
    routes to the right queue, escalates if SLA risk.
  version: "1.4.0"
  variables:
    - name: ticket
      type: object
      description: Inbound ticket payload from the webhook.
    - name: sla_minutes
      type: number
      default: 30
      description: SLA window the routing decision will respect.

  steps:
    - id: normalize_payload
      function: setVariable
      description: Coerce vendor-specific payloads into our canonical shape.
      input:
        ticket_id: $ticket.id
        body: $ticket.body
        channel: $ticket.channel
      output: t

    - id: classify_intent
      function: llmCall
      description: Two-shot classifier; returns one of billing / technical / churn / spam.
      input:
        model: claude-haiku-4
        system: You are a support triage classifier. Return one of billing|technical|churn|spam.
        user: $t.body
      output: intent
      on_error_step_id: classifier_failed

    - id: enrich_in_parallel
      kind: parallel
      description: Fan out the slow enrichment calls so total latency = max(branches), not sum.
      branches:
        - - id: fetch_customer
            function: apiRequest
            input:
              endpoint: /customers/$t.customer_id
            output: customer
        - - id: fetch_account_value
            function: queryDb
            input:
              query: SELECT arr FROM accounts WHERE id = $t.customer_id
            output: arr
        - - id: fetch_open_tickets
            function: apiRequest
            input:
              endpoint: /tickets?customer=$t.customer_id&status=open
            output: open_tickets

    - id: route
      kind: if
      description: Route by intent and account value. High-ARR + churn signal → human, fast.
      condition: $intent
      then:
        - id: high_value_check
          kind: if
          condition: $arr
          then:
            - id: assign_csm
              function: apiRequest
              input:
                endpoint: /assignments
                method: POST
                body:
                  ticket: $t.ticket_id
                  assignee_pool: csm
          else:
            - id: assign_tier1
              function: apiRequest
              input:
                endpoint: /assignments
                method: POST
                body:
                  ticket: $t.ticket_id
                  assignee_pool: tier1

    - id: watch_sla
      kind: while
      description: Poll for human acknowledgement until SLA window closes.
      condition: $unacknowledged
      body:
        - id: poll_ack
          function: apiRequest
          input:
            endpoint: /tickets/$t.ticket_id/ack
          output: unacknowledged
        - id: sleep
          function: sleep
          input:
            seconds: 60

    - id: escalation_check
      kind: if
      condition: $unacknowledged
      then:
        - id: escalate
          function: pageOnCall
          description: Page the on-call manager — SLA missed.
          input:
            severity: P2
            message: SLA breached on ticket $t.ticket_id

    - id: classifier_failed
      function: setVariable
      description: Quiet fallback if the LLM classifier was unavailable.
      input:
        intent: technical
      output: intent
      next_step_id: enrich_in_parallel
